description: Run multi-step Claude Code work without drift. Plugin reads your project's spec and drafts a per-run scope contract; you click APPROVE on a modal gate. Then research → plan → execute → verify → critique runs end-to-end with three fast modal gates, an opt-in real-time judge, and evidence-driven auto-promote (when checks are clean, the manager gate skips automatically). One namespaced skill (/agent-pipeline-claude:run); no YAML to hand-author; no grant files.
name: agent-pipeline-claude
